fields.name: id
fields.label: Unique ID (e.g. bangkok-first-24)
fields.description: Used as the localStorage key. Don't change after publishing or users lose progress.

fields.name: _note
fields.label: Note
fields.description: This block has no fields — it renders the interactive sliders.

fields.name: url
fields.label: Google Maps URL
fields.description: Paste any Google Maps link — short links (maps.app.goo.gl) work too. The card auto-fills name, photos, rating, and address from Google.

fields.name: name
fields.label: Override name (optional)
fields.description: Only set if you want a different label than Google's name.

fields.name: ourRating
fields.label: Our rating (0–10)
fields.description: Your personal score for nomads. Renders alongside Google's crowd rating. One decimal is fine (e.g. 9.2).

fields.name: ownPhotos
fields.label: Your photos
fields.description: Your own photos of this place. Appear first in the carousel with an 'Original' badge. Drag to reorder. If empty, only Google's photos are shown.

fields.name: loveLabel
fields.label: Your notes label
fields.description: Heading above your bullet points. Defaults to 'Why we love this place' if left blank.

fields.name: lovePoints
fields.label: Your bullet points
fields.description: Why you like it. Keep each point short — these render as a list.

description.value: References another document, used as a foreign key
